notes.clean.csv: Mostly clean sales-like dataset with no deliberate duplicates and no missing values.
notes.dirty.csv: Contains missing values, a duplicate row, a constant column, and an empty column.
notes.correlation.csv: Two numeric columns with strong positive correlation.
notes.dates.xlsx: Workbook with DataSheet and Archive sheets; Event Date supports datetime/date coverage tests.
notes.collision_columns.csv: Original column names intentionally collide after normalization.
notes.edge_small.csv: Very small 2-row dataset for edge-case tests.
notes.all_null_column.csv: Contains one all-null column to test weak schema and empty-column detection.
